markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Andre Webster for a GrowthX Account Executive role.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proven Tech AE:** 9+ years in tech sales (Foxit, Contentful), consistently exceeding quota with deals up to $2.8M.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Strategic Outbound:** At Cypress, built a creative, AI-assisted outbound campaign that generated $500k in pipeline in one month.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Complex Deal Navigator:** Closed a multi-year Contentful deal with a financial firm by solving critical uptime and global scalability issues.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [**Collaborative Builder:** Seeks a long-term role to build processes and partner with Tyler, the founding AE.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2770.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background & Philosophy

  - [**Experience:** 13 years in sales, with the last 9 in tech.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Past Roles:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
      - [**Foxit (4 yrs):** 2nd BDR hire; built processes, hired team. Promoted to AE, exceeding quota annually ($1.6M → $2.8M).](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - **Contentful (2 yrs):** \#1 AE in North America (Q1/H1); grew Southeast territory 20%.
      - [**Cypress (contract):** Built outbound processes; closed deals at 200% of quota.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Sales Philosophy:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Framework:** MEDDIC/MEDPICC for qualification.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [**Methodology:** Value & Solution Selling, focused on business outcomes.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [**Career Goal:** A long-term, impactful role to apply skills and grow.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### Complex Deal Example 1: Financial Firm (Contentful)

  - [**Challenge:** A financial firm with a legacy CMS suffered from critical uptime issues and needed to scale globally.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Solution:** Positioned Contentful as the secure, scalable platform to solve these core problems.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**Value Proposition:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [**Uptime:** 99.99% SLA to ensure constant access to funds.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [**Global Scale:** Centralized content for 18 countries, reducing time-to-market (e.g., from 2 months to 2 weeks).](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Revenue Impact:** Connected uptime loss to billions in potential revenue and showed how global expansion would drive growth.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - **Outcome:** A 5–6 month process resulted in a multi-year deal plus professional services. Andre was the \#1 AE in North America that quarter.

### Complex Deal Example 2: Media Company (Contentful)

  - [**Challenge:** A historic media company with 200 years of content required a complex, multi-stakeholder sale.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [**Initial Misstep:** Overcame an objection from the SVP of Digital Transformation who expected a demo, not discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [**Technical Hurdles:** Addressed engineering concerns by bringing in a Solutions Architect to explain implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
      - [**Legal Bottleneck:** Resolved a 3–4 week redline stalemate by scheduling a direct call with legal teams.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
      - [**Pricing Issue:** Corrected a budget mismatch caused by outdated pricing info; Andre created a custom proposal to secure the deal.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [**Outcome:** A 5-month process secured a multi-year deal, adding a key media logo to Contentful's client roster.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [**Self-Assessment:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - [**Accomplishment:** Overcoming the initial objection and rebuilding trust.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
      - [**Areas for Improvement:** Could have pushed for higher revenue and intervened earlier in the legal process.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)

### Outbound Campaign Example: Cypress

  - [**Challenge:** Cypress, an inbound-focused company, needed an outbound strategy for its new accessibility product.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [**Personalization:** Used AI to find and quote prospects' own accessibility statements in outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Urgency:** Tied messaging to the mandatory European Accessibility Act (EAA) deadline.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
      - [**Tools:** Outreach for sequences; ChatGPT/Claude for copy; a custom AI tool to scrape websites for statements.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Andre booked 4 meetings in the first two weeks; the team generated $500k in pipeline in one month.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)

### GrowthX Context & Future

  - [**Current State:** Inbound-only sales model; Tyler is the founding AE.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [**Value Proposition:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
      - [**Speed:** Faster time-to-value than building in-house.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2463.0)
      - [**Expertise:** Access to a network of content experts (e.g., former TechCrunch EIC).](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2502.0)
      - [**Process:** A "services-as-software" model with transparent, sophisticated workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2577.0)
  - [**Future Vision:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)
      - [**Q1 Product Launch:** A new SaaS tool to compete with platforms like Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2681.0)
      - [**Hybrid Model:** Continue high-touch services while adding self-serve software.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2641.0)
  - [**Role Expectation:** High collaboration with Tyler to navigate an evolving product and sales strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2730.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Provide feedback on Andre's interview to the hiring team.](https://fathom.video/share/tyo7wsTuSpCGoMkTcT3-8QSqCwwQkZhM?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
